findings.evidence: The file already has the general coefficient formula at lines 128-131; lines 168-173 prove the generic `neg_pos`/`WithZero.log_lt_log` step specialized to `algebraMap R K r`.
findings.fix: Add a general lemma such as `coeff_principalDivisor_pos_iff_valuation_lt_one (u) (v) : 0 < coeff ((OrderSystem.ofDedekindDomain R K).principalDivisor u) v ↔ v.valuation K ((Additive.toMul u : Kˣ) : K) < 1`, then derive the integral `↔ r ∈ v.asIdeal` case using `v.valuation_lt_one_iff_mem`.
findings.issue: `coeff_principalDivisor_pos_iff_mem` repeats the log/valuation argument only for `algebraMapUnit hr`; the natural statement is for any `u : Additive Kˣ`, characterizing positive coefficient by `v.valuation K ((Additive.toMul u : Kˣ) : K) < 1`.

summary: The Dedekind order system is at the intended concrete level, but one exported coefficient lemma proves only the integral-element specialization where the natural valuation-level statement is available and should be the primary API.
